runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "Go", "build_system": "Make", "package_manager": "go (Go modules)", "build_commands": ["make"], "install_commands": ["apk add --no-cache bash gawk git make", "apk add --no-cache ca-certificates fuse3 tzdata", "echo \"Enable user_allow_other in fuse\" >> /etc/fuse.conf"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "1.26.0", "system_packages": ["ca-certificates", "fuse3", "tzdata"]}, "repo_type": "cli_tool", "base_image": "alpine:3.23.3", "base_image_rationale": "Minimal Alpine runtime with fuse3 support suitable for distributing the rclone binary.", "pitfalls": ["CGO_ENABLED is forced to 0 in the build; ensure any CGO-dependent features are not required.", "Fuse configuration requires enabling user_allow_other in the host/container for mount access."], "notes": "This blueprint mirrors a multi-stage build: a Go-based builder (Go1.26.x on Alpine) and a small Alpine runtime image that includes fuse3 and tzdata. The final binary is copied to /usr/local/bin and the container runs as a non-root rclone user."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
# Build stage: Go 1.26 on Alpine for rclone
FROM golang:alpine AS builder

ARG CGO_ENABLED=0

WORKDIR /go/src/github.com/rclone/rclone/

RUN echo "**** Set Go Environment Variables ****" && \
    go env -w GOCACHE=/root/.cache/go-build

# Install build dependencies
RUN echo "**** Install Build Dependencies ****" && \
    apk add --no-cache \
        make \
        bash \
        gawk \
        git

# Download Go modules first to leverage cached layers
COPY go.mod .
COPY go.sum .

RUN echo "**** Download Go Dependencies ****" && \
    go mod download -x

RUN echo "**** Verify Go Dependencies ****" && \
    go mod verify

# Copy the rest of the source code
COPY . .

# Build the binary
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/go-build,sharing=locked \
    echo "**** Build Binary ****" && \
    make

RUN echo "**** Print Version Binary ****" && \
    ./rclone version

# Final runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23.3

# Runtime dependencies
RUN echo "**** Install Runtime Dependencies ****" && \
    apk add --no-cache \
        ca-certificates \
        fuse3 \
        tzdata && \
    echo "Enable user_allow_other in fuse" >> /etc/fuse.conf

# Copy the built binary from the builder
COPY --from=builder /go/src/github.com/rclone/rclone/rclone /usr/local/bin/

# Create non-root user to run the binary
RUN addgroup -g 1009 rclone && adduser -u 1009 -Ds /bin/sh -G rclone rclone

# Run as non-root user by default
USER rclone

ENTRYPOINT ["rclone"]

WORKDIR /data
ENV XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/config

FROM golang:alpine AS builder

ARG CGO_ENABLED=0

WORKDIR /go/src/github.com/rclone/rclone/

RUN echo "**** Set Go Environment Variables ****" && \

# Copy the rest of the source code

# Build the binary

    echo "**** Build Binary ****" && \
    make

RUN echo "**** Print Version Binary ****" && \
    ./rclone version

# Final runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23.3

# Runtime dependencies
RUN echo "**** Install Runtime Dependencies ****" && \
    apk add --no-cache \
        ca-certificates \
        fuse3 \
        tzdata && \
    echo "Enable user_allow_other in fuse" >> /etc/fuse.conf

# Copy the built binary from the builder

# Create non-root user to run the binary
RUN addgroup -g 1009 rclone && adduser -u 1009 -Ds /bin/sh -G rclone rclone

# Run as non-root user by default
USER rclone

ENTRYPOINT ["rclone"]

WORKDIR /data
ENV XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/config
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore git repo
.git
.gitignore
# Ignore build outputs and vendor
build
vendor
**/vendor
# Ignore Go build cache
**/.cache/go-build
# Ignore temporary files
*.tmp
*.log
**/*.swp
**/*.swo

"}

artifacts.content:
# Build stage: Go 1.26 on Alpine for rclone
FROM golang:alpine AS builder

ARG CGO_ENABLED=0

WORKDIR /go/src/github.com/rclone/rclone/

RUN echo "**** Set Go Environment Variables ****" && \
    go env -w GOCACHE=/root/.cache/go-build

# Install build dependencies
RUN echo "**** Install Build Dependencies ****" && \
    apk add --no-cache \
        make \
        bash \
        gawk \
        git

# Download Go modules first to leverage cached layers
COPY go.mod .
COPY go.sum .

RUN echo "**** Download Go Dependencies ****" && \
    go mod download -x

RUN echo "**** Verify Go Dependencies ****" && \
    go mod verify

# Copy the rest of the source code
COPY . .

# Build the binary
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/go-build,sharing=locked \
    echo "**** Build Binary ****" && \
    make

RUN echo "**** Print Version Binary ****" && \
    ./rclone version

# Final runtime image
FROM alpine:3.23.3

# Runtime dependencies
RUN echo "**** Install Runtime Dependencies ****" && \
    apk add --no-cache \
        ca-certificates \
        fuse3 \
        tzdata && \
    echo "Enable user_allow_other in fuse" >> /etc/fuse.conf

# Copy the built binary from the builder
COPY --from=builder /go/src/github.com/rclone/rclone/rclone /usr/local/bin/

# Create non-root user to run the binary
RUN addgroup -g 1009 rclone && adduser -u 1009 -Ds /bin/sh -G rclone rclone

# Run as non-root user by default
USER rclone

ENTRYPOINT ["rclone"]

WORKDIR /data
ENV XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/config
